title: Lead Investment Banker at Walker Chandiok

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Walker Chandiok
jsonLd.description:
We at Walker Chandiok are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
